title: Charleroi, Hainaut — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Charleroi, Hainaut: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Charleroi is a city in Hainaut with a population of 201,000. A city in transformation with Belgium’s lowest housing costs, a growing creative scene, and excellent air connectivity via Brussels South Airport.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
